translations.fr: On va trouver un compromis aujourd’hui.
translations.yue: 我哋今日會搵到個折衷辦法。
translations.pt: Hoje vamos chegar a um acordo.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta sẽ tìm được một thỏa hiệp.
translations.nb: I dag finner vi et kompromiss.
translations.id: Hari ini kita akan menemukan jalan tengah.
translations.sv: I dag hittar vi en kompromiss.
translations.ro: Astăzi vom ajunge la un compromis.
translations.da: I dag finder vi et kompromis.
translations.ja: 今日は折り合いがつくよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; functions as clausal subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive and selects an accusative object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates time of the event.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for the following noun.

sentences.target: Er schlägt einen Kompromiss für morgen vor.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʃlɛːkt ˈaɪnən kɔmpʁoˈmɪs fyːɐ̯ ˈmɔʁɡən foːɐ̯/

translations.de: Er schlägt einen Kompromiss für morgen vor.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʃlɛːkt ˈaɪnən kɔmpʁoˈmɪs fyːɐ̯ ˈmɔʁɡən foːɐ̯/
translations.en: He proposes a compromise for tomorrow.
translations.es: Él propone un acuerdo para mañana.
translations.fr: Il propose un compromis pour demain.
translations.yue: 佢提議聽日搵個折衷辦法。
translations.pt: Ele propõe um acordo para amanhã.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đề xuất một thỏa hiệp cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: Hij stelt voor om morgen een compromis te sluiten.
translations.hi: वह कल के लिए समझौते का प्रस्ताव देता है.
translations.nb: Han foreslår et kompromiss for i morgen.
translations.sv: Han föreslår en kompromiss för i morgon.
translations.ro: El propune un compromis pentru mâine.
translations.da: Han foreslår et kompromis til i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼は明日のために妥協案を提案する。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; clausal subject.
Finite main verb of a separable verb (vorschlagen), present indicative, 3rd person singular; head of the clause.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Kompromiss'.
Common noun, masculine singular, accusative; direct object of the verb.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Temporal adverb within the PP 'für morgen'; specifies the intended time.
Separable verb particle forming 'vorschlagen' with 'schlägt'; appears in clause-final position.

sentences.target: Ich suche mit ihr einen Kompromiss.

translations.de: Ich suche mit ihr einen Kompromiss.
translations.en: I’m looking for a compromise with her.
translations.es: Estoy buscando un acuerdo con ella.
translations.fr: Je cherche un compromis avec elle.
translations.it: Sto cercando un compromesso con lei.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在和她寻求一个折中方案。
translations.pt: Estou procurando um acordo com ela.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một thỏa hiệp với cô ấy.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن حل وسط معها.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een compromis met haar.
translations.hi: मैं उसके साथ समझौते की तलाश कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter et kompromiss med henne.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari jalan tengah dengan dia.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en kompromiss med henne.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter et kompromis med hende.
translations.ja: 彼女と折り合いをつけようとしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; clausal subject.

sentences.target: Am Ende akzeptieren beide den Kompromiss.

translations.de: Am Ende akzeptieren beide den Kompromiss.
translations.en: In the end, both accept the compromise.
translations.es: Al final, ambos aceptan el acuerdo.
translations.fr: Au final, les deux acceptent le compromis.
translations.it: Alla fine, entrambi accettano il compromesso.
translations.zh-Hans: 最后两人都接受了妥协。
translations.yue: 最後兩個人都接受咗個折衷方案。
translations.pt: No fim, ambos aceitam o acordo.
translations.he: בסופו של דבר, שניהם מקבלים את הפשרה.
translations.tr: Sonunda ikisi de uzlaşmayı kabul ediyor.
translations.vi: Cuối cùng, cả hai đều chấp nhận thỏa hiệp.
translations.ar: في النهاية، كلاهما يقبل الحل الوسط.
translations.nl: Uiteindelijk accepteren ze allebei het compromis.
translations.hi: आखिर में, दोनों समझौते को स्वीकार करते हैं.
translations.el: Στο τέλος, και οι δύο δέχονται τον συμβιβασμό.
translations.ja: 結局、二人とも妥協案を受け入れる。
